instructions_to_main_agent: Strict adherence to the provided color palette, typography stack, and spacing guidelines. Do NOT use any hero images, stock photos, or illustrations. Generous whitespace, typography-first approach. Add data-testid to all interactive and key informational elements. DO NOT use generic bento grids or shadowed rounded rectangle cards. Use editorial lists and crisp typography. Build components in HTML+Tailwind (JSX/JS). The domain is B2B strategic marketing practice. Think law firm with taste.

allowed: translate-y by small amount (e.g., 10px) on scroll reveal

do: Use typography and negative space as the primary visual drivers
Use warm white (#f5f1eb) as default background
Vary navy (#13243d) background sections intentionally (e.g., Home hero, footer, high-signal moments)
Use #444444 for body text on light background and warm white for text on navy background
Use editorial, well-set lists instead of bento-box grids or shadowed cards
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes
Make the site feel like it came from the same hand as the provided business card
dont: NO hero images, NO stock photography, NO illustrations
NO gradients of any kind (especially no purple/violet AI-slop defaults)
NO dark text on dark backgrounds
NO shadowed rounded rectangles for cards
NO forms or Calendly embeds (only email links)

global_nav.structure: Sticky or static header, transparent or solid warm white. Wordmark on left (Scandia bold), Nav links on right (Home, Work, About, Writing, Connect). Nav links should be clean sans-serif, hover state with subtle steel blue underline.

global_footer.structure: Navy background (#13243d), warm white text (#f5f1eb). Wordmark, Email CTA (connect@methodmarketinggroup.com), Minimal legal text. Substantial padding (py-32).

home.hero: Navy background (#13243d), text in warm white. Typography-only hero showcasing the tagline ('Clarifying how you show up in the market.') in Cormorant Garamond.
sections: The Model: Warm white background. High typographic hierarchy using Scandia for headers, Cormorant Garamond for pull quotes.
Who We Work With: Warm white background. Clean editorial list layout, avoiding card blocks.
Closing CTA: Navy or warm white block. Large typography driving to connect@methodmarketinggroup.com.

work_index.structure: Page title in Scandia. Editorial list of case studies ('Engagement 01: Manufacturing...', 'Engagement 02: MedTech'). Each item acts as a clickable row or clean text block separated by subtle steel blue or navy 1px lines, not shadowed cards.

work_detail.structure: Long-form editorial layout. Opening statement (Cormorant Garamond), 'The Work' (bulleted list/clean columns), 'The Outcome' narrative. Generous padding, readable measure (max-w-prose).

about.structure: Company philosophy in large serif/sans text. Gary Hopkins bio (founder/principal). Link to blog. Editorial, clean columns.

writing_index.structure: 5-10 mock article list. Clean editorial list (date, title, short excerpt, 'Read more' link in steel blue). No bento cards. Just beautifully typeset rows.

writing_detail.structure: Article title (H1 Scandia), Date/Author metadata. Body copy in max-w-2xl container for readability. Pull quotes in Cormorant Garamond.

connect.structure: Simple, highly focused page. Large email CTA (connect@methodmarketinggroup.com). No forms.
